meta.description: A feedback or learning loop in a pipeline specification.

description.description: What is learned or fed back.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_4d061861_f599_4d64_9c9a_00a077a232da" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "name" TEXT,
    "description" TEXT,
    "type" TEXT,
    "effect" TEXT,
    "status" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_4d061861_f599_4d64_9c9a_00a077a232da" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_4d061861f5994d64_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
